name: Sarah Jenkins
bio: Sarah is a self-taught engineer with 12+ years of experience. Formerly at Google and Netflix, she specializes in modern JavaScript frameworks and web performance optimization.

name: Alex Rivera
bio: Alex has spent a decade refining digital user experiences for Fortune 500 companies. He loves teaching the intersection of psychology, visuals, and interactive interfaces.

name: Marcus Chen
bio: Marcus is an angel investor and business strategist. He has helped launch 20+ startups and loves breaking down complex accounting and corporate finance concepts for beginners.

name: Emily Watson
bio: Emily is a digital marketer with a focus on SEO and marketing automation. She has successfully scaled online retail brands to 8-figure revenues.

name: David Miller
bio: David has traveled the world for National Geographic and major brands. He teaches camera mastery, visual storytelling, and Adobe Lightroom workflows.

name: Sophia Patel
bio: Sophia works with tech founders and executives to build emotionally intelligent teams, master conflict resolution, and achieve career acceleration.
